title: Transformation using electroporation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fgcrj","text":"For transforming cells with the DNA of interest using electroporation as the tool.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4vasg","text":"The electro-competent cells should be done thoroughly to ensure complete washing away of extra ions which might cause sparking while pulsing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To an electroporation cuvette add 50 µL electro-competent cells of the required strain, 70-100 ng of DNA of interest and 50 µL of autoclaved ultrapure water (milliQ)
Keep the cuvette in ice for 00:20:00
Pulse the cuvette using a pulser using the bacteria setting at 2.5keV Ensure that there is no sparking
To the cuvette add 2X LB up to same volume
Spread the contents of the cuvette onto an LA plate with appropriate antibiotics
creator: Ashwinuday
